description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image, sets the CI_PROJECT_NAME variable to UsageStats, and defines a cache keyed by CI_PROJECT_ID storing the .gradle directory. Include a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle and runs chmod +x ./gradlew. Define a single stage called build and a job named buildRelease in that stage that runs ./gradlew assembleRelease, creates an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8} with the path build/outputs/apk/release, and is limited to the master branch only.
